description.overview: Collies are the graceful, devoted dogs immortalized by Lassie. They're intelligent, loyal family companions known for their devotion to children.
description.temperament: Collies are gentle, devoted, and highly attuned to their family's emotions. They're excellent with children and protective without aggression.
description.health: Prone to eye problems (CEA), MDR1 gene (drug sensitivity), and hip dysplasia. Get eyes and MDR1 tested.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play. Enjoy herding activities and dog sports.

not_for: Those who dislike barking or grooming
verdict.summary: The ultimate family dog—loyal, gentle, and wonderful with children. Collies need regular grooming and space but reward you with unwavering devotion. Perfect for families.
